title: Responsive ERD Toolbar Layout and Edit Views Button ID
story: As a DataTools Pro user on a smaller monitor, I want the ERD toolbar to remain clean and properly aligned as the browser window shrinks, so that controls are usable at any viewport width.
description:
## Context
The ERD toolbar looks good at full width but breaks visually on smaller screens. Toggles become misaligned and the "Edit Views" button wraps awkwardly.

## Changes
1. Add `@media` CSS queries to handle toolbar layout at resolutions below 1200px.
2. Stack the two toggle controls with proper alignment when space is limited.
3. Apply `white-space: nowrap` to the "Edit Views" button to prevent text wrapping.
4. Add `id="Edit_ERD_Views"` to the Edit Views button for analytics tracking.

## Edge Cases
- Toggle alignment at various breakpoints between desktop and tablet widths needed multiple iterations to get right.
acceptance_criteria: Toolbar layout is clean at full desktop width
Below 1200px, toggles stack and remain aligned
Edit Views button does not wrap text at any width
Edit Views button has id='Edit_ERD_Views' for analytics
Toolbar is usable on tablet-sized viewports
ux_changes: Responsive CSS media queries for the ERD toolbar ensure clean layout at all viewport widths. Toggles stack properly below 1200px. Edit Views button uses white-space: nowrap and has an analytics ID.
implementation_notes: CSS @media breakpoint at 1200px handles toggle stacking. white-space: nowrap on Edit Views button. ID attribute added for analytics integration. Required multiple iterations to get toggle alignment right at intermediate widths.
comment_summary: Developer implemented responsive fixes and deployed to staging. Initial review found toggles still slightly offset at certain widths. After a second iteration the alignment was corrected.
